summary: Excellent Sacramento show with standout China Cat > Rider ender and a soaring Playing in the Band > Uncle John > Miracle jam, though recording source is unclear.
review: The concert captured by this archive entry is praised for its fun opening set, highlighted by a tight China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider transition, and an expansive second‑set jam that weaves Playing in the Band, Uncle John's Band, and Miracle into a memorable sequence. Reviewers also note a beautiful Box of Rain encore and vivid memories of the Cal Expo atmosphere. No details about the recording source or sound quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review emphasizes strong musical performance and highlights; lack of recording details prevents a higher confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening set described as fun with a notable China Cat/Rider ender; second set flows through an extended Playin > Uncle John > Playin > Miracle jam that was very well received, ending with a beautiful Box of Rain encore.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob (referred to as Bobby) opens the show with '1 More Saturday Night'.
